text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During a stroll downtown, I notice a certain
Umamusume in a store.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... The color's cute, but I'd prefer something
a li'l fluffier.

text_block_list.name: Curren's Fan A
text_block_list.text:
U-um! Excuse me. Are you, by any chance...
Curren?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yep! Thaaat's me!

text_block_list.name: Curren's Fan A
text_block_list.text: O-OMG! It's really you!

text_block_list.name: Female Customer A
text_block_list.text: Curren's here?! No way! The real deal?!

text_block_list.name: Male Customer B
text_block_list.text:
I thought my eyes were playing tricks on me! She's
even cuter in person!

text_block_list.name: Curren's Fan A
text_block_list.text: I, um... I'm always checking your Umastagram!

text_block_list.name: Curren's Fan B
text_block_list.text: Me too! I'm your biggest fan, and...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the blink of an eye, Curren Chan is surrounded
by her adoring fans.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Considering she came here to shop, I start to
wonder if she appreciates all this extra attention.
However...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it must be fate that brought us together
today. ♪ We should take a selfie to remember
this moment... If that's okay with you!

text_block_list.name: Curren's Fan A
text_block_list.text: Eh, a s-selfie? T-together?! Really?!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Of course! I'd looove to take selfies with
everyone else, too!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, buuut we should do it over there so we don't
bother the other customers! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren's Fans
text_block_list.text: Okay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
True to her word, Curren Chan spends time with
each fan, giving them undivided attention.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And without a hitch, she effortlessly leaves all her
fans happy and satisfied.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hey you, the trainer over there! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yep! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You were looking out for me, right? I hope I
didn't worry you too much! ♪
choice_data_list: Yeah. I could tell you really love your fans.
Yeah. I could tell you really love your fans.
Yeah, but didn't you come to buy something?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You were looking out for me, right? I hope I
didn't worry you too much! ♪
choice_data_list: Yeah. I could tell you really love your fans.
Yeah. I could tell you really love your fans.
Yeah, but didn't you come to buy something?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, of course, silly! They're my precious fans,
so I didn't want to disappoint them!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Besides, I think hanging out with everyone makes
me look totes cuter!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Don't you think so tooo? ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm blinded by the sheer intensity of Curren
Chan's cuteness! No wonder she's completely
captured her fans' hearts!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yep! ♪ I'm not in a rush, though. Besides, I kinda
expected this to happen. ☆

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: More importantly...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You're such a sweetheart for worrying about me.
Thank you soooo much! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm blinded by the sheer intensity of Curren
Chan's cuteness! No wonder she's completely
captured her fans' hearts!
